'''Yoribuunt''' was a beautiful, swirling [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Yoribuunt system/Legends|Yoribuunt system]] of the [[Tharin sector/Legends|Tharin sector]] near [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. It was a popular stop for sight-seers on luxury liners.<ref name="Atlas" />

{{Planet-stub}}
